TypeParams.T: Type of the metadata value. This should be something that can be serialized by JSON.

ConstructorArguments: Parse a package ident into parts. There are a few different formats you can pass to this. - org/package - org.package - org.package#version - https://sbox.game/org/package - https://sbox.game/org/package#version If package version isn't specified version will be null
Produces a package ident of the form .[#|#].
